'''sashungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanomethylation|cyanomethylation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanomethylation|cyanomethylation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sashungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæshingith|sæshingith]] || [[word:sæshingij|sæshingij]] || [[word:sæshingish|sæshingish]] || [[word:sæshingi|sæshingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashushunguth|sashushunguth]] || [[word:sashushunguj|sashushunguj]] || [[word:sashushungush|sashushungush]] || [[word:sashushungu|sashushungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashunguth|sashunguth]] || [[word:sashunguj|sashunguj]] || [[word:sashungush|sashungush]] || [[word:sashungu|sashungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashufngufth|sashufngufth]] || [[word:sashufngufj|sashufngufj]] || [[word:sashufngufsh|sashufngufsh]] || [[word:sashufnguf|sashufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sashunguthu|sashunguthu]] || [[word:sashunguju|sashunguju]] || [[word:sashungushu|sashungushu]] || [[word:sashunguku|sashunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sashunguth|sashunguth]] || [[word:sashunguj|sashunguj]] || [[word:sashungush|sashungush]] || [[word:sashungu|sashungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sashunguthul|sashunguthul]] || [[word:sashungujul|sashungujul]] || [[word:sashungushul|sashungushul]] || [[word:sashungukul|sashungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sashunguuthuthu|sashunguuthuthu]] || [[word:sashunguujuju|sashunguujuju]] || [[word:sashunguushushu|sashunguushushu]] || [[word:sashunguuku|sashunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sashunguthun|sashunguthun]] || [[word:sashungujun|sashungujun]] || [[word:sashungushun|sashungushun]] || [[word:sashungukun|sashungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sashunguthuoro|sashunguthuoro]] || [[word:sashungujuoro|sashungujuoro]] || [[word:sashungushuoro|sashungushuoro]] || [[word:sashungukuoro|sashungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
